scripts.run: bun run ensure-venv && infisical run --path=/scraper -- uv run --project .
scripts.run:dev: bun run ensure-venv && infisical run --path=/scraper -- uv run --project . --group dev
scripts.dev: bun run run -- python -m scraper.main markdown https://example.com
scripts.test: bun run run:dev -- python -m pytest tests
scripts.typecheck: bun run run -- python -m compileall src
scripts.markdown: bun run run -- python -m scraper.main markdown
scripts.css: bun run run -- python -m scraper.main css
scripts.llm: bun run run -- python -m scraper.main llm
